typeDefinitionPatterns.description: Navigate from @apply utility reference to its generated CSS definition.
Navigate from theme() function call to the corresponding value in tailwind.config.js.
Navigate from screen() function call to the breakpoint definition in config.
Navigate from display utility class to its CSS display property definition.
Navigate from color utility to color definition in the theme.
Navigate from @config directive to the Tailwind configuration file.
Navigate from @layer definition to corresponding @tailwind injection point.
